rationale: Four replications: (1) fred_indpro (γ=0.94, AR(1)-non-sep); (2) btcusdt_1h (γ≈0, white-noise); (3) nsr2db nsr001 n=1 pilot SUPERSEDED; (4) nsr2db n=5 multifractal pilot — γ mean=0.50 std=0.44 (n=1 was outlier), Δh=0.19 multifractal, h(q=2)=1.10 metastable, beat-null rejects 4/5. Two-dimensional fingerprint (h(q=2), Δh) replaces single-γ marker. Cross-substrate convergence NOT supported by cardiac substrate at n=5 pilot. Bumped 3→4 in the same PR.
